hooks.text: Everyone saw the market today — but this is the part they missed.
Indian markets just got hit by something bigger than the headline.
Information Technology moving is not the real story today. Here's what is.
Here's why information technology moved today, in 30 seconds.
Nifty IT: ~-2.7% on the day — and it came down to one thing.
You think the index tells the story. Today it didn't.
Why did information technology really move today?
